what: extractor-blocked-needs-human label — the human-triage signal added when the automation can't proceed and hands the issue to a person: the agent's bail path (agent-prompt-extractor.md), the finalize anomaly hand-off (phase2-finalize.sh), and the prepare workflow's failure step (auto-implement-extractor.yml) when Phase 1 breaks before the hand-off (e.g. an undownloadable page). Created idempotently before use. Counts include comments.
